nasb.text: Now you have indeed gone away because you longed greatly for your father’s house; but why did you steal my gods?”

esv.text: And now you have gone away because you longed greatly for your father’s house, but why did you steal my gods?”

cnv.text: 現在你既然渴想你的父家，一定要回去，為甚麼又偷我的神像呢？”

ccb.text: 你思家心切，一定要走，但你为什么要偷走我的神像呢？”

csbs.text: 现在，你因为切切思念你的父家，一定要走，但为什么偷了我的神像呢？”
